card_description: Cussick (Jack) is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Solar Lottery*. Bodyguard to the new Quizmaster who must protect him from assassination. Name note: Bodyguard and protagonist. The protector navigating a world governed by chance. First appears in *Solar Lottery*.

reference.brief: Bodyguard to the new Quizmaster who must protect him from assassination
reference.significance: The protector navigating a world governed by chance
